typologies.name: Structuring / Smurfing
typologies.description: Breaking large transactions into smaller ones to avoid reporting thresholds
indicators: Same sender, multiple transactions within short time window

typologies.name: Round-Tripping / Circular Flows
typologies.description: Funds flowing in a circle back to the originator through intermediaries
indicators: A sends to B, B sends to C, C sends back to A
Similar amounts at each hop (minus small fees)

typologies.name: Rapid Fund Movement
typologies.description: Funds received and immediately transferred out (pass-through)
indicators: Incoming transfer followed by outgoing transfer within minutes
Account balance returns to near-zero after each cycle

typologies.name: Layering
typologies.description: Complex chains of transactions to obscure fund origin
indicators: Multiple intermediary accounts with no other activity
Progressively smaller amounts at each layer
Different transaction types used (transfer, payment, cash-out)

typologies.name: Velocity Abuse
typologies.description: Abnormally high transaction frequency for account profile
indicators: Sudden spike in activity after dormant period

typologies.name: Dormant Account Activation
typologies.description: Sudden high-value activity on previously inactive account
indicators: No transactions for 90+ days, then large transfer
Account ownership or contact details recently changed
First transaction is high-value outgoing transfer
